text.title: Rate Floor — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a `RateFloor` output. Must satisfy this contract before returning to operator.

list.item: `sensitivity` — array of 3 objects {band: enum {low, baseline, high}, billable_pct, floor_usd_per_hour}
`inputs_warning` — array (may be empty) of `{field, message}` for capped/clamped inputs

antipattern.description: `sensitivity` has fewer than 3 bands or bands not at ±10pp billable.
`defense_narrative` discloses raw target income to prospect.
antipattern.reason: Operator's income is not the prospect's business. Narrative should defend the rate using market and load, not personal finance.

list.item: Convert to non-USD currency at current rate for non-US operators (annotate currency).
Drop benefits row in jurisdictions where employer-equivalent benefits are state-funded (e.g. NHS).

text.reference: JSON Schema the output validates against.

list.item: Caps (r1, r3) applied or input data cited.
Defense narrative does NOT leak raw income.
